gaps: No GitHub repositories were found for a dedicated Mixlayer CLI during research.
A plain OpenAI-compatible wrapper would miss Mixlayer's reasoning_content stream, homogeneous Qwen 3.5 ladder, seed determinism, and free guard-model tier.
patterns: Mixlayer is OpenAI-compatible at https://models.mixlayer.ai/v1 and requires MIXLAYER_API_KEY bearer auth.
The documented model ladder uses Qwen rungs with 131K context and tool/reasoning support, while the console-visible catalog also includes Qwen 3.6 and Kimi Code IDs.
response_format json_schema cannot be combined with thinking mode, so privacy detection must use strict JSON without thinking while ladder reasoning uses thinking without json_schema.

novel_features.name: Large-data privacy ingest
novel_features.description: Split large CSV/text inputs into deterministic tranches, redact each tranche through one shared local vault, and reassemble a masked corpus with a manifest.
novel_features.rationale: The free 4B tier is useful as a guard/worker before a frontier model sees data.

novel_features.name: Shielded frontier ask
novel_features.description: Redact local data, run an outbound PII tripwire, send only the masked payload to a frontier model, rehydrate the answer locally, and save a privacy receipt.
novel_features.rationale: The local vault preserves utility while keeping raw values off the wire.

novel_features.name: PII scan tripwire
novel_features.description: Detect high-risk PII locally with CI-friendly exit codes and no upstream model call.
novel_features.rationale: Files should be blockable before a frontier send.

novel_features.name: Reversible redaction
novel_features.description: Write a masked copy of a file and populate the local token-to-value vault with stable pseudonyms.
novel_features.rationale: Cross-tranche consistency depends on one durable vault.

novel_features.name: Shape coarsening
novel_features.description: Drop columns, bucket numeric values, and coarsen dates to reduce re-identification risk before prompting.
novel_features.rationale: Masking alone does not remove all re-identification risk.

novel_features.name: Local vault management
novel_features.description: List, rehydrate, rotate, or purge the local reversible pseudonym vault without sending values upstream.
novel_features.rationale: Rehydration and cleanup must remain local-only.

novel_features.name: Privacy receipt ledger
novel_features.description: Inspect outbound payload hashes, byte counts, model IDs, masked entity counts, and residual leak counts for shielded sends.
novel_features.rationale: Operators need proof of what was sent.

novel_features.name: Model ladder comparison
novel_features.description: Run one prompt across selected Mixlayer model rungs, optionally comparing reasoning_content, latency, token usage, and cost.
novel_features.rationale: The same model family across rungs makes capability/cost comparisons meaningful.

novel_features.name: Confidence-gated escalation
novel_features.description: Start on a cheap rung and climb only when the prior answer appears insufficiently confident.
novel_features.rationale: The free/cheap rungs should absorb easy work.

novel_features.name: Reasoning council
novel_features.description: Fan out to member model rungs and ask a judge model to synthesize answers and flag disagreements.
novel_features.rationale: Reasoning traces are a useful judge input.

novel_features.name: Everyday reasoning ask
novel_features.description: Ask Mixlayer, optionally request reasoning_content, and save prompt, answer, model, seed, token usage, cost, and raw response locally.
novel_features.rationale: The reasoning ledger compounds over repeated use.

novel_features.name: Seed replay
novel_features.description: Re-run a saved prompt with its original model and seed to check determinism or drift.
novel_features.rationale: Mixlayer documents seed determinism as best-effort.

novel_features.name: Reasoning grep
novel_features.description: Search saved prompts, answers, and reasoning traces through the local FTS ledger.
novel_features.rationale: Local FTS keeps prior reasoning usable without resending it.

novel_features.name: Cached model DSL
novel_features.description: Query a local model cache with DSL terms like ctx>=128k tools reasoning, seed it with documented and console-visible model IDs, and optionally refresh it from live /models.
novel_features.rationale: Agents need a compact model shortlist, not a pasted catalog.

novel_features.name: Read-only ledger SQL
novel_features.description: Run SELECT-only SQLite queries over the local ledger, vault, audit, ladder, and model cache tables.
novel_features.rationale: Power users need direct local analysis.

novel_features.name: Savings rollup
novel_features.description: Roll up saved ledger cost against static GPT or Claude frontier baselines.
novel_features.rationale: Cost claims should be grounded in the local ledger.

novel_features.name: Cheap-vs-frontier compare
novel_features.description: Run a prompt through a cheap rung and frontier rung, report the cost delta, and attach a local-history quality note.
novel_features.rationale: The cost proof should compare actual saved runs.
